text:
First, note that in 1206, time zones as we know them did not exist, but for the purpose of this exercise, we assume modern time zone offsets applied historically.

Europe/London is UTC+0 (or UTC+1 during DST, but DST not relevant in 1206).  
Asia/Riyadh is UTC+3 (no DST in 1206).  
So Riyadh is 3 hours ahead of London.

10:00 + 3 hours = 13:00 (1:00 PM) on the same date.

FINAL_ANSWER: 13:00
